'''Malo VI''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="PC">{{WEGCite|story=The Politics of Contraband (adventure)|book=The Politics of Contraband}}</ref> in the [[Malo system/Legends|Malo system]]<ref name="TEA-OC" /> where a warrant was issued for the arrest of [[Tegist Byrg]].<ref name="PC" />

[[Jensaarai/Legends|Jensaarai]] [[Mei (Dark Jedi)|Mei]] and [[Bpfasshi/Legends|Bpfasshi]] [[Fomadu]], both mourning the [[Death/Legends|deaths]] of family members lost to the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], first met on Malo VI, where they joined forces in search of revenge.<ref name="Wolf">{{StoryCite|story=Lone Wolf: A Tale of Obi-Wan and Luke|book=SkyeWalkers: A Clone Wars Story}}</ref>
